description: Verify that the hazard analysis are conducted.
Verify that the reasonably foreseeable hazards are identified.
Verify that the hazard analysis is written.
Verify that biological hazards are identified and evaluated.
Verify that hazards that occur naturally are identified and documented.
Verify that intentionally introduced for economic gain is identified and evaluated.
Verify that the severity and probability of hazard occurrence is assessed.
Verify that the environmental pathogens for ready-to-eat foods are evaluated.
Verify that raw materials and other ingredients are identified and evaluated.
Verify that sanitation, including employee hygiene is identified and evaluated.
